The character is sitting comfortably on a modern sofa in an elegant contemporary living room. She holds a ceramic coffee mug naturally with both hands while relaxing. Her body is slightly angled, and her head is gently turned as she gazes toward a warm floor lamp beside the sofa with a calm, thoughtful expression. Natural seated fashion pose with realistic posture, relaxed shoulders, elegant leg placement, authentic fabric drape, and subtle clothing folds without distorting the garment.

Marketplace fashion commerce photography, product-first styling, garment details, silhouette, and fabric texture remain clearly visible. Fashion marketplace product-listing photography with accurate garment readability while maintaining an attractive lifestyle presentation.

Luxury interior with a refined sofa, warm ambient lighting, a modern floor lamp as the visual focal point, tasteful minimalist decoration, cozy premium atmosphere, restrained retail-inspired styling.

Hard directional editorial lighting combined with warm practical lamp illumination, balanced lighting contrast, clean highlights, subtle realistic shadows, natural indoor color temperature.

Shot on a modern high-resolution full-frame mirrorless camera with an 85mm lens, shallow depth of field, sharp focus, realistic optical rendering, minor chromatic aberration, subtle corner softness, natural filmic color grading, realistic skin texture, fine fabric detail, slight digital grain, avoiding CGI look, no AI-generated artifacts, ultra photorealistic
